creator: diizzy@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 256177
Patch for libical

* Replace PORTVERSION with DISTVERSION for consistency
* Rearrange Makefile to improve readability and consistency with the rest of the tree
* Enable unit tests
* Remove unncessary CFLAGS and patch
* Import _IMPLIES lines from previous submitted patch

Compile and runtime tested on FreeBSD 14.1-RELEASE (amd64) (make, make check-plist, make test)

Poudriere testport OK 13.4-RELEASE (amd64)
Poudriere testport OK 14.2-RELEASE (amd64)

Tested with following consumers in 13.4-RELEASE (amd64) using Poudriere:
converters/ical2html
databases/evolution-data-server
databases/pg-gvm
deskutils/akonadi-calendar-tools
deskutils/akonadiconsole
deskutils/bijiben
deskutils/elementary-calendar (fails due to plist-issue, unrelated)
deskutils/gnome-calendar
deskutils/gnome-planner
deskutils/gnome-todo
deskutils/kalarm
deskutils/knotes
deskutils/korganizer
deskutils/orage
deskutils/simpleagenda
deskutils/zanshin
finance/kmymoney
mail/balsa
mail/claws-mail-vcalendar
mail/cyrus-imapd310
mail/cyrus-imapd36
mail/cyrus-imapd38
mail/evolution
mail/evolution-ews
misc/wmcalendar
net/kf5-kcalendarcore
net/kf6-kcalendarcore
net/libkgapi
security/gvmd (fails due to stage-qa, unrelated)
x11/gnome-shell
